---

## 1. Services

SeenBy agrees to provide the AI visibility monitoring and reporting services described in the **Scope of Work** attached as **Schedule A** (the "Services").

The specific tier, platforms, and deliverables are as set out in Schedule A. SeenBy may update its tooling, scan methods, and report format from time to time; material changes to deliverables will be communicated in writing at least 14 days in advance.

---

## 2. Term & Renewal

2.1 This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and has a **minimum commitment period of three (3) months** ("Minimum Term").

2.2 After the Minimum Term, this Agreement renews **automatically on a month-to-month basis** unless either Party gives written notice of cancellation in accordance with Clause 4.

2.3 If Client opts for annual prepayment, the term is twelve (12) months from the Effective Date, subject to the annual prepayment discount stated in Schedule A.

---

## 3. Fees & Payment

3.1 **Setup Fee:** The one-time setup fee stated in Schedule A is due on or before the Effective Date, prior to commencement of work.

3.2 **Monthly Retainer:** The monthly retainer stated in Schedule A is due **on or before the 1st of each month** (or the anniversary date, if mid-month start).

3.3 **Invoicing:** SeenBy will issue invoices via email to the address provided by Client. Invoices are payable within **7 calendar days** of issue.

3.4 **Late Payment:** Invoices unpaid after 7 days incur a late fee of RM 50. SeenBy reserves the right to pause Services until outstanding amounts are settled.

3.5 **Payment Methods:** DuitNow, FPX bank transfer, or Wise (for international clients). Payment details are provided on each invoice.

3.6 **Price Changes:** SeenBy may adjust retainer pricing with **30 days' written notice**. Client may cancel without penalty within that notice period if they do not accept the new pricing.

3.7 **No Refunds:** Fees paid for a completed month or completed setup work are non-refundable.

---

## 4. Cancellation

4.1 Either Party may terminate this Agreement by providing **30 days' written notice** via email to the other Party, provided the Minimum Term has elapsed.

4.2 Client may terminate during the Minimum Term only in the event of a material breach by SeenBy that remains uncured for 14 days after written notice of such breach.

4.3 SeenBy may terminate immediately if Client fails to pay two consecutive invoices, or if Client uses the Services for any unlawful purpose.

4.4 Upon termination, SeenBy will deliver any outstanding reports due for completed months and cease further Services.

---

## 5. Deliverables & Intellectual Property

5.1 **Client Reports:** Monthly PDF reports, weekly digests, and toolkit files generated for Client are licensed to Client for their own internal and marketing use.

5.2 **SeenBy Methods:** The scan engine, scoring methodology, query frameworks, and all underlying software and systems remain the exclusive intellectual property of SeenBy. No licence to these is granted to Client.

5.3 **Client Data:** SeenBy uses Client's brand name, domain, and competitor information solely to perform the Services. SeenBy does not sell, share, or use this data for any other purpose.

---

## 6. Data Handling & Privacy (PDPA 2010)

6.1 SeenBy complies with the **Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Malaysia)** in the collection and processing of any personal data related to Client's business.

6.2 **Raw scan responses** (AI platform outputs) are stored for **90 days**, then purged.

6.3 **Client data** is archived for **6 months after contract end**, then permanently deleted.

6.4 SeenBy does not surface raw AI responses, confidence scores, token counts, or internal system data to Client or any third party.

6.5 Client warrants that any personal data they share with SeenBy (e.g. customer emails for digest CC) has been collected lawfully and with appropriate consent.

---

## 7. Confidentiality

Each Party agrees to keep the other Party's confidential information (including pricing, business data, and reports) strictly confidential and not to disclose it to any third party without prior written consent, except as required by law.

---

## 8. Results Disclaimer

8.1 AI visibility is influenced by many factors outside SeenBy's control, including changes to AI platform algorithms, training data, and query patterns.

8.2 SeenBy does not guarantee specific visibility scores, rankings, citation frequency, or business outcomes.

8.3 Past performance shown in case studies or proposals is indicative only and not a guarantee of future results.

---

## 9. Limitation of Liability

9.1 SeenBy's total liability to Client under this Agreement shall not exceed the **total fees paid in the three (3) months immediately preceding the claim**.

9.2 SeenBy shall not be liable for indirect, consequential, incidental, or loss-of-profit damages of any kind.

9.3 SeenBy shall not be liable for any failure to perform caused by circumstances beyond its reasonable control (including but not limited to AI platform API outages, changes to third-party platform policies, or internet disruptions).

---

## 10. Client Responsibilities

Client agrees to:
- Provide accurate brand, competitor, and contact information.
- Designate a single point of contact for all communications.
- Respond to approval requests (e.g. report review, toolkit implementation) within **5 business days**.
- Implement the AI Readiness Toolkit files on their own website (SeenBy provides files and instructions only).
- Not share the read-only client view link publicly or with competitors.

---

## 11. General

11.1 **Governing Law:** This Agreement is governed by the laws of Malaysia.

11.2 **Dispute Resolution:** The Parties will attempt to resolve disputes amicably. If unresolved within 30 days, disputes shall be referred to the courts of Malaysia.

11.3 **Entire Agreement:** This Agreement and Schedule A constitute the entire agreement between the Parties and supersede all prior discussions or representations.

11.4 **Amendments:** Any amendments must be in writing and signed by both Parties.

11.5 **Severability:** If any provision is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue in full force.
